name: Floral Essential Oils
description: Soft, calming oils distilled from blossoms and petals for aromatherapy and cosmetic use.

products.name: Lavender Essential Oil
products.notes: Fresh floral aroma with a gentle herbal finish.

products.name: Rose Geranium Oil
products.notes: Rosy, green, and slightly citrus-like aroma.

name: Citrus Essential Oils
description: Bright and uplifting oils expressed from citrus peels for fragrance and wellness blends.

products.name: Sweet Orange Oil
products.notes: Juicy, sweet, and fresh peel aroma.

name: Herbal Essential Oils
description: Clean, green, and refreshing oils sourced from leaves, herbs, and aromatic plants.

products.name: Peppermint Oil
products.notes: Cool mint aroma with a crisp menthol character.

name: Spice & Wood Oils
description: Deep, warm oils for perfumery, incense, wellness blends, and specialty formulations.

products.name: Cedarwood Oil
products.notes: Dry woody aroma with soft balsamic depth.

products.name: Clove Bud Oil
products.notes: Warm, spicy, and intense clove aroma.
